sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16917" key="a)sxolhmatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσχολ-ημᾰτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n16917.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard-working,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:233:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">233.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
